title: Amtech F0600 2 Piece Chuck Key Set
features: 3 SIZES: This 2 piece chuck key set contains black finish replacement keys with T-bars for 8mm (5/16"), 10mm (3/8") and 13mm (1/2") chucks
DURABLE BUILD: Made to withstand regular use in demanding environments
SIZE CAPACITY: 8 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
PRECISION PERFORMANCE: Provides smooth and accurate results
DIY & TRADE USE: Reliable choice for both professionals and home projects
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 2Pc Chuck Key Set See more
